definition: 人生中命中注定的重要时刻，通常指那些尴尬、痛苦但却塑造了你的经历。用于幽默或自嘲地描述那些
origin: 源自2023年电影《蜘蛛侠：纵横宇宙》(Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse)。在电影中，每个蜘蛛侠都有命中注定的
来塑造他们的成长。社交媒体将其引入日常生活。
dialogue:
A: She's dating that guy again even though everyone warned her...
B: I can't interfere. It's her canon event.

A: I literally just got ghosted and journaled about it for three days straight.
B: Girl, that's so canon. Main character arc unlocked. 💀
examples: My 2012 haircut was a canon event I had to live through.
Getting ghosted and journaling about it? Canon.
Failing that exam was a canon event—it made me who I am today.
You had to date him... it was your canon event.
Therapy was my canon event. No cap.
usage_tips: 通常用于自嘲或幽默场合，不适合严肃的专业场合。使用时可以配合 💀 或 😭 等emoji增强效果。
